summary: Completed testing of iteration 107 features: Import from Net Worth button, Confidence Gauge design fix, and Client Portal Layout integration. All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend verification confirmed all features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Demo client data auto-generated by /api/wealth-data/snapshot/demo_client endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 107 features fully tested. Gauge uses custom SVG semicircle with clean percentage display. Client Portal at /client-portal uses Layout component with sidebar navigation.
